# accessflow_review_plan (Resource)

A review plan: AI review + multi-stage human approval policy attached to datasources.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "accessflow_review_plan" "standard" {
  name                    = "standard"
  description             = "AI review then one human approval; reads auto-approved."
  requires_ai_review      = true
  requires_human_approval = true
  min_approvals_required  = 1
  approval_timeout_hours  = 24
  auto_approve_reads      = true

  approvers = [
    {
      user_id = "11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111"
      stage   = 1
    }
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `approval_timeout_hours` (Number)
- `approvers` (Attributes List) Ordered approver stages. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--approvers))
- `auto_approve_reads` (Boolean)
- `description` (String)
- `min_approvals_required` (Number)
- `notify_channels` (List of String) Notification channel IDs to notify on review events.
- `requires_ai_review` (Boolean)
- `requires_human_approval` (Boolean)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `organization_id` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--approvers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `approvers`

Required:

- `stage` (Number)

Optional:

- `role` (String) `ADMIN` or `USER`.
- `user_id` (String)
